channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
Fw overgrown hedge Needs cutting back to boundary Approx30 mtrs length Give and take (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food or animals' muck on pavement, 27th May
item.description:
Food or animals' mess on pavement by the Hare and Hounds bus stop (Gloucester-bound).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
Overgrown Tree FW Give and take TM With Temporary FW Closure Cut to clear height on FW (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, dropping branches on cars, 27th May
item.description:
Opposite the entrance to the hatherley pub, Hatherley Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 300, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 27th May
item.description:
STATS REQUIRED near house CWPH 3000 x 2200 x 45mm MARKED AS NUMBER 1 STANDARD TM (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 27th May
item.description:
15MDB CWPH 400 x 400 x 42mm MARKED AS NUMBER 2 (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 27th May
item.description:
15MDB CWED 600 x 400 x 41mm MARKED AS NUMBER 1 5 x nsf (CW10 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The timetables on the bus stops on each side of the road at the Frogmill are incorrect. The westbound stop claims an eastbound schedule and vice versa, 27th May
item.description:
Both bus stops on either side of the A436 outside the Frogmill. The post is dated from May 3 2026 so the issue has been present almost a month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A436, Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge series of potholes along stretch of road, 27th May
item.description:
Multiple potholes, easily noticeable when you drive along that road. Two of the potholes were spray painted around about 3 months ago but nothing has been done about them to date. They have all been there for well over a year!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Down Hatherley Lane, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop sign on A40, Shipton Oliffe crossroads totally obscured by overgrown vegetation and or Tree Limbs., 27th May
item.description:
Shipton oliffe crossroads layby, just over the lights, Oxford direction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed vehicle with flat tyre, 27th May
item.description:
Outside ITSA
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 27th May
item.description:
28day with Standard tm lift and reset sunken rocking gully STATS (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 27th May
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM with fway closure please cut back overgrown brambles/hedges back to boundary approx 12m x 1.5m x 1.5m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned sign, 27th May
item.description:
This sign has been left following the resurfacing of Swindon Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
